Package org.rodinp.internal.core.relations

Class LegacyItemParsers

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.relations.LegacyItemParsers
public class LegacyItemParsers extends Object
Parsers for the legacy editorItems extensions contributed through the Event-B UI plug-in. editorItems is the old extension point providing item relation constraints to Rodin elements.
